title: Flourish Stock Stew
description: A savory and fluffy American dish featuring beef stock cubes as the base with a touch of adventurous flavor without using eggs.

ingredients.name: Beef Stock Cubes
ingredients.notes: Ensure you use fresh beef stock cubes for best results.

ingredients.name: Onion, Chopped
ingredients.notes: Using a medium onion gives the stew a good balance of flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves, Mashed
ingredients.notes: Mashing garlic makes it easier to cook while still retaining its strong flavor.

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers, Sliced
ingredients.notes: Adding a variety of colors gives the dish more visual appeal and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Carrots, Chopped
ingredients.notes: Chopped carrots provide a nice contrast in texture to the stew.

ingredients.name: Celery, Stems Removed & Chopped
ingredients.notes: The celery provides a subtle yet essential taste that complements other ingredients.

ingredients.name: Leaves of Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: Fresh thyme adds herbal notes to the stew, enhancing its overall flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Cold Water
ingredients.notes: Using cold water helps prevent any unwanted reactions during cooking and ensures a flavorful stock base.

instructions: Place beef stock cubes in a large pot with cold water. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low.
Add chopped onion and mashed garlic cloves to the boiling mixture and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced bell peppers, carrots, and chopped celery. Stir well and cover.
Simmer gently for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, ensuring vegetables are fully tenderized.
Stir in fresh thyme leaves and continue simmering for another 15-20 minutes to infuse the flavors into the stock.
Remove from heat. Allow it to cool down slightly before blending into a smooth consistency if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice, noodles, or crusty bread.
